# Membership Tiers

The loyalty program consists of three tiers: Silver, Gold, and Platinum. Membership starts at Silver with zero points, transitions to Gold after accumulating five thousand lifetime points, and reaches Platinum at twenty thousand lifetime points. Gold members benefit from free expedited shipping, while Platinum members enjoy additional perks such as a dedicated support line and early access to seasonal sales. Membership status is reassessed annually, and if a member fails to earn points within a twelve-month period, they will drop one tier.

[Source: loyalty_program.md#membership-tiers]
